## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Affected SDK(s)

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Node.js (`sdk-node/`)
- [ ] Python (`sdk-python/`)
- [ ] Go (`sdk-go/`)
- [ ] OpenAPI spec / shared
- [ ] Repo infrastructure (CI, docs, tooling)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and passing
- [ ] Coverage gate met (≥ 90% Node + Python, ≥ 85% Go)
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and format clean
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in committed files
- [ ] Conformance scenarios still pass for affected language(s)
- [ ] Code examples if applicable
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry (or `changesets` for Node) added if user-facing
- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
